hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You'll need a variable to track your current position as you look through the rack

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a for-each loop to look at each tile one by one

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: If the current tile matches the letter, convert the position to a string and build the result message

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Don't forget to increase your position counter after each tile

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: If you get through the whole rack without finding the letter, return the error message
